title: Update README leaderboard with recent record submissions
author: cocohearts
body:
## Summary

- adds #1184 Scylla + Full GPTQ + XSA-all + FA3 to the leaderboard
- adds #1143 Scylla tokenizer + legal score-first TTT to the leaderboard
- adds #1120 Rascal to the leaderboard
- adds #1060 coprime-loader + Full GPTQ + XSA-all to the leaderboard
- adds #1148 Muon TTT + entropy-adaptive epochs to the leaderboard
- adds #1031 LeakyReLU(0.75)^2 + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon to the leaderboard

#1019 was already present on `main`, so this PR leaves that existing row in place.

## Checks

- `git diff --check README.md`
- verified the seven requested PR numbers are represented in the leaderboard table
